I also want to thank all of you for all the constant follows and reviews im getting, its a really huge support for me and i really, really appreciate everything i get from you no matter what it is. so as always, if you had enjoyed the bot or just simply want to support me, leave a review or a follow, i honestly appreciate and look at everything i get, thank you for everything once again!
